title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入阿曼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入阿曼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Oman DGSM standards practice, APSR / Nama grid-connection expectations, IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 safety references, UN 38.3 transport evidence, fire-safety review, and 50 Hz project settings.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与阿曼DGSM标准实践、APSR / Nama并网要求、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933安全参考、UN 38.3运输证据、消防审查及50Hz项目设定的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與阿曼DGSM標準實務、APSR / Nama併網要求、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933安全參考、UN 38.3運輸證據、消防審查及50Hz項目設定的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DGSM scope determination, APSR approval, Nama grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Oman standards, grid, fire, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DGSM适用范围裁定、APSR批准、Nama并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿曼标准、并网、消防、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DGSM適用範圍裁定、APSR批准、Nama併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿曼標準、併網、消防、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Oman, the practical compliance gap is usually not a single BESS product mark. Exporters should confirm DGSM or project adoption of IEC battery and BESS standards, prepare IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence where requested, maintain UN 38.3 transport documentation, and map PCS protection, power-quality, fire-safety, and 50 Hz settings to APSR / Nama project requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口阿曼时，实际合规差距通常不是单一BESS产品标志。出口商应确认DGSM或项目是否采用IEC电池和BESS标准，在被要求时准备IEC 62619和IEC 62933证据，维护UN 38.3运输文件，并将PCS保护、电能质量、消防安全和50Hz设定映射至APSR / Nama项目要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口阿曼時，實際合規差距通常不是單一BESS產品標誌。出口商應確認DGSM或項目是否採用IEC電池和BESS標準，在被要求時準備IEC 62619和IEC 62933證據，維護UN 38.3運輸文件，並將PCS保護、電能品質、消防安全和50Hz設定映射至APSR / Nama項目要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
